name: python3-hpack
title: python3-hpack
description:
Pure-Python3 HTTP/2 header encoding (HPACK)
This module contains a pure-Python HTTP/2 header encoding (HPACK) logic
for use in Python programs that implement HTTP/2. It also contains a
compatibility layer that automatically enables the use of nghttp2 if
it’s available.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-hpack because Pure-Python3 HTTP/2 header encoding (HPACK).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-hpack as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-hpack with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-hpack --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
